examples: Spearheaded the development of a real-time American Sign Language (ASL) translator, achieving a 95% accuracy rate.
Built a scalable and secure RESTful API for a university-wide coding competition, serving over 500 active users.
Optimised an XGBoost model by 25% through advanced hyperparameter tuning and feature engineering.

long: Spearheaded the development of a real-time American Sign Language (ASL) translator leveraging a custom-trained YOLOv8 model and custom dataset, achieving a 95% accuracy rate.
Designed and implemented a full-stack challenge submission system for a university coding competition, handling over 1000 submissions with a 99.9% uptime.

attention_items.recommendation: Vary language to enhance impact. For example, 'implemented' could be replaced with 'delivered', 'deployed', 'executed', or 'built'.

consistency.notes: Tone and diction are slightly warmer and less technical in the cover letter, which is appropriate for the format. Perspective correctly shifts from implicit in CV to first-person in the cover letter. Overall, the documents are well-aligned.
